programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: Hobo reveals an ambitious imposter to a small religious community.

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: Hobo helps a go-cart driver who is trying a earn a position on the national racing team.

programme.title: Timber Titans
programme.desc: The Peters crew grinds through some of the biggest logs of the season, while old iron and thick fog threaten to shut them down; up north, after a two-year drought, Freya Logging battles relentless rain as fall takes hold of the community forest.

programme.title: Inside Taronga Zoo
programme.desc: A mystery lump on Ras the camel's ear has everyone stumped so it's time to investigate; the team find themselves in the middle of a life and death struggle to save an eastern long neck turtle with a fishhook stuck down its neck.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: The Southern boats battle an angry ocean and short weather windows to find scattered fish.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: Hobo reveals an ambitious imposter to a small religious community.

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: Hobo helps a go-cart driver who is trying a earn a position on the national racing team.

programme.title: Dog Tales Rescue
programme.desc: Phoebe arrives with two broken legs; Ilana tries working with a horse who is afraid of people.

programme.title: Dog Tales Rescue
programme.desc: A dog with two paralyzed back legs returns; the team gets ready for the garden-themed festival.

programme.title: Dog Tales Rescue
programme.desc: Rob assesses a dog at risk of being put down; Tony and Moby gain some interest from families.

programme.title: Dog Tales Rescue
programme.desc: Rob starts training 18 pitbull mixes in Florida; Danielle is worried about the health of a draft horse.

programme.title: Dog Tales Rescue
programme.desc: Rob and Danielle travel to Israel to rescue dogs; a family meets a dog that they've been longing for; a visit to some pigs on a farm.

programme.title: Dog Tales Rescue
programme.desc: A dog with amputated front paws arrives; Ilana trims an energetic foal's hooves; Danielle gets a special visit.

programme.title: Inside Taronga Zoo
programme.desc: A wild koala has an unknown illness, and a new sea lion arrives at the zoo.

programme.title: Biggest & Baddest
programme.desc: Niall rescues gators from the suburbs of Houston, Texas and meets some of the largest alligators in captivity.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: The Fire Crew battles its way back from a disastrous setback; the Opal Queen battles rock hard walls alone, desperate to find opal; the Boulder Boys abandon their drill and hunt for opal by hand.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: Rookie Justin tackles a deal that could make or break him; the Boulder Boys race to save their claim from a monsoon flood; on their last dig of the season, the Cooke Brothers finally hit pay dirt.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: Britton on the Doghouse proves he may have the ace crew in the Outer Banks.

programme.title: Inside Taronga Zoo
programme.desc: Masego the wild dog needs surgery on a worrying lump on her chest; a little penguin comes in to the hospital after narrowly surviving an eagle attack; a mission to Norfolk Island to save one of the world's most endangered species from extinction.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: The fleet struggles as warm water brings a wave of big tunas through the Outer Banks.

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: A mime and a deaf boy help Hobo prevent a robbery.

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: A family is trapped on a deserted island.

programme.title: Dr. Keri: Prairie Vet
programme.desc: Dr. Keri looks after bulls who seem determined to hurt themselves.

programme.title: Dr. Keri: Prairie Vet
programme.desc: Dr. Keri's dog, Siri, brings home a wild baby fox, which starts her on a quest to learn more about caring for wildlife.

programme.title: Pets & Pickers
programme.desc: A cat with suspected broken knees leads the vets to make a difficult decision.

programme.title: Pets & Pickers
programme.desc: The RAPS team is surprised by what is discovered in a Golden Doodle's stomach; the Boo Boo Kitty is treated for diabetes.

programme.title: Inside Taronga Zoo
programme.desc: The team treats a sick platypus and two galahs learn to take flight.

programme.title: Mega Zoo
programme.desc: A routine health check takes a frightening turn for lion brothers Lwazi and Ato; keepers await to see if otter couple Odie and Paula are expecting; a gorilla named Kanzi must prove she can receive vital medical care.

programme.title: Gem Hunters Down Under
programme.sub-title: Necessity Is The Mother Of Invention
programme.desc: Following the highs and lows of sapphire hunters working in extreme conditions in the heart of Central Queensland, Australia.

programme.title: Gem Hunters Down Under
programme.desc: Anthony learns to cut gems while Jodie goes underground to mine alone; the Richardsons dig deep at the old Rabbi Claim; the Old Timers attempt to move a 500 kg billie boulder out of the shaft wall.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: The herds have arrived and the fleet jumps into action to try and get their share.
